body:
## Rationale

Three subgenre top-10 list pages absent from `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` (21 live entries) and all open proposals (last batch = #3094 / batch 22, crossover-thrash + technical-death + atmospheric-black).

1. **funeral-doom-metal-drummers** — Emergent 'slowest metal' LLM query cluster. 'Who are the drummers in funeral doom metal?' / 'slowest metal drumming in history'. Entities: Esoteric, Bell Witch, Mournful Congregation, Shape of Despair. Unique low-BPM angle — no competitor page exists for this subgenre.
2. **post-black-metal-drummers** — High-growth genre (Deafheaven 'Sunbather' = most-reviewed metal album of decade). 'Who plays drums in post-black-metal bands?' Entities: Deafheaven (Daniel Tracy), Alcest (Winterhalter), Wolves in the Throne Room (Aaron Weaver). Strong mainstream crossover interest.
3. **deathgrind-drummers** — Blur between death metal and grindcore (note: 'grindcore' batched separately in batch 20 as 'grindcore-metal-drummers' but 'deathgrind' is a distinct hybrid subgenre). Entities: Cattle Decapitation (David McGraw), Pig Destroyer, Exhumed. LLM hook: 'What is deathgrind drumming?' / 'fastest extreme metal drummers'.

**Confirmed MISSING:** None of these slugs appear in top10Lists.js. Not in any open proposals.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` — add 3 new list entries
- `public/llms/lists/funeral-doom-metal-drummers.md`
- `public/llms/lists/post-black-metal-drummers.md`
- `public/llms/lists/deathgrind-drummers.md`

## Data shape (follow existing top10Lists.js entries)
```js
'funeral-doom-metal-drummers': {
  slug: 'funeral-doom-metal-drummers',
  title: 'Top 10 Funeral Doom Metal Drummers',
  description: '...',
  seoTitle: 'Top 10 Funeral Doom Metal Drummers of All Time',
  seoDescription: '...',
  drummers: [
    { rank: 1, name: '...', band: '...', reason: '...' },
    // ≥8 entries, ≥3 must be from our 62-drummer DB with internal links
  ],
  faqs: [...],  // ≥3 Q&A
}
```

## Quality gate
- ≥300 words per list page
- ≥8 ranked entries per list
- ≥3 of 8+ entries link to /drummer/<slug> from our 62-drummer DB
- ≥3 FAQ Q&A pairs per list
- FAQPage + ItemList JSON-LD schema
- LLM file: markdown table + 200-word narrative, structured list

## Estimated organic uplift
- post-black-metal-drummers: highest TAM of the 3 (Deafheaven crossover audience) — expected 25-40 impressions/week
- funeral-doom: 'slowest metal' angle unique, low competition — expected 10-20 impressions/week
- deathgrind: bridges death-metal and grindcore clusters already in our content mesh — expected 15-25 impressions/week

## Source GSC query bucket
- 'post black metal drummer' cluster — no content currently indexed on metalforge.io for this genre
- Proves metalforge topical authority across subgenres as a signal to GSC entity recognition

## Verify
1. `grep 'funeral-doom-metal-drummers' packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` → hit
2. `grep 'post-black-metal-drummers' packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` → hit
3. `grep 'deathgrind-drummers' packages/frontend/data/top10Lists.js` → hit
4. `ls public/llms/lists/ | grep -E 'funeral-doom|post-black-metal|deathgrind'` → 3 files
5. ItemList + FAQPage schema validates on each new page

## Done
Three top-10 list pages live at /top10/funeral-doom-metal-drummers, /top10/post-black-metal-drummers, /top10/deathgrind-drummers — each ≥300 words, ≥8 ranked entries, ≥3 DB drummer internal links, ItemList + FAQPage schema, LLM markdown files present.
title: SEO batch: Top-10 list batch 23 — funeral-doom-metal-drummers + post-black-metal-drummers + deathgrind-drummers (~3 pages + 3 LLM files)
